name: Power Slap: Road to the Title
original_name: Power Slap: Road to the Title
overview: Power Slap is the world’s premier slap fighting organization, licensed and sanctioned by the Nevada State Athletic Commission. Led by Dana White, Power Slap features competitors from across the globe battling on the ultimate stage to showcase their power, technique and resolve.

trailers.title: Power Slap: Road To The Title Premieres January 18 on TBS!
